pi_items.metadata_value: ARS (Agence Régionale de Santé) - French health regulatory agency
pi_items.verified_value: ARS is a real French Regional Health Agency, autonomous public establishment under Ministry of Health supervision
pi_items.source: Web search: Regional Health Agency exists and was established 1 April 2010, responsible for regional health policy implementation

pi_items.metadata_value: MedinTux - French medical practice management software
pi_items.verified_value: MedinTux is real free open-source French medical software available on SourceForge, Windows version 2.16.012 (2014-07-11)
pi_items.source: Web search and install_medintux.sh lines 46-56: downloaded from SourceForge at https://downloads.sourceforge.net/project/medintux/

pi_items.verified_value: French SSN is 15 digits (13-digit base + 2-digit control key). Test data stores 13-digit base only (database design choice)
pi_items.source: Web search confirms format. Test data: AUDIT_COMPLET='2850675012345' parses as Female(2) born 1985-06 department 75 (Paris)

privileged_info_summary: The patient_data_audit task uses synthetic test data from a French medical database (MedinTux's DrTuxTest). Five test patients are created with specific missing fields: AUDIT_COMPLET (complete record), AUDIT_NODOB (missing date of birth), AUDIT_NOSS (missing social security number), AUDIT_NOADDR (missing address), and AUDIT_MULTI (missing DOB, address, and phone). The database uses 13-digit French social security number format (without 2-digit control key). Data joins occur between fchpat (patient details) and IndexNomPrenom (patient index) tables. The task context references ARS (Agence Régionale de Santé), which is a real French health regulatory agency established in 2010.
